diagrams.name: project_initialization
diagrams.title: Project Initialization
diagrams.description: Creating a new Composer project or bootstrapping an existing one via init and create-project commands

diagrams.name: package_installation
diagrams.title: Package Installation
diagrams.description: Installing dependencies from composer.json or adding new ones with the require command

diagrams.name: package_update_and_removal
diagrams.title: Package Update and Removal
diagrams.description: Updating packages to newer versions or removing them from the project

diagrams.name: dependency_resolution
diagrams.title: Dependency Resolution
diagrams.description: Resolving version constraints, solving dependency graphs, and managing the lock file
diagrams.scope: Dependency solver and lock file management

diagrams.name: repository_management
diagrams.title: Repository Management
diagrams.description: Adding, removing, and interacting with package repositories (Packagist, VCS, path, etc.)

diagrams.name: package_downloading
diagrams.title: Package Downloading
diagrams.description: Downloading packages from various sources including Git, SVN, ZIP, and HTTP

diagrams.name: plugin_management
diagrams.title: Plugin Management
diagrams.description: Loading, registering, activating, and deactivating Composer plugins

diagrams.name: configuration_management
diagrams.title: Configuration Management
diagrams.description: Reading, writing, and validating Composer configuration (composer.json and global config)

diagrams.name: authentication_and_security
diagrams.title: Authentication and Security
diagrams.description: Managing credentials for repositories and auditing packages for vulnerabilities

diagrams.name: autoload_generation
diagrams.title: Autoload Generation
diagrams.description: Generating and dumping PHP autoload files for installed packages

diagrams.name: script_execution
diagrams.title: Script and Binary Execution
diagrams.description: Running composer scripts, script aliases, and vendor binaries

diagrams.name: package_information_and_search
diagrams.title: Package Information and Search
diagrams.description: Querying, showing, and searching package metadata, suggestions, and funding info

diagrams.name: dependency_analysis
diagrams.title: Dependency Analysis
diagrams.description: Analyzing dependency graph: why a package is required, what prohibits an upgrade, and outdated packages

diagrams.name: archive_management
diagrams.title: Archive Management
diagrams.description: Creating distribution archives (zip, tar) of packages

diagrams.name: platform_and_diagnostics
diagrams.title: Platform Requirements and Diagnostics
diagrams.description: Checking PHP platform requirements, installed extensions, and diagnosing environment issues

diagrams.name: cache_management
diagrams.title: Cache Management
diagrams.description: Managing the Composer download and metadata cache

diagrams.name: self_update_and_global
diagrams.title: Self-Update and Global Commands
diagrams.description: Updating Composer itself and managing globally installed packages
